completed_tasks.description: Root cause identified + radial offset fix applied to renderHBadges

current_task.description: Browser verification: confirm badges appear outside ring perimeter on benzene / ring molecules

context_notes.bug_summary: H badges for implicit hydrogens were colliding with bonds and hidden behind them on ring molecules.
context_notes.root_cause: renderHBadges used a fixed +20 downward SVG offset. For atoms in the upper half of a ring, +20 pushes the badge INTO the ring interior, landing it on a bond line. For adjacent ring atoms, all badges cluster at the same y-zone.
context_notes.fix_applied: Two-pass radial offset in src/hooks/useKetcherHighlights.ts: first pass collects all atom centers via getBBox(), computes centroid, second pass offsets each badge 18px AWAY from the centroid (unit vector from centroid to atom). Single-atom fallback: offset straight up (-y). Added paint-order='stroke fill' with white stroke halo (stroke-width=3) for readability over any residual bond-line overlap.
context_notes.stale_handoff_note: Previous HANDOFF.json was from Phase 07 multi-fragment bug — all those files were already committed before this session. This handoff supersedes it.

human_actions_pending.action: Browser test: draw benzene (or load a ring molecule preset), hover individual h-layer sub-tokens — confirm badges appear OUTSIDE the ring, not inside or on bond lines
human_actions_pending.context: Radial offset fix needs empirical verification in the live Ketcher SVG; unit tests mock getBBox() so they cannot verify actual visual placement

decisions.decision: Radial offset from centroid (18px) instead of fixed +20 downward
decisions.rationale: Fixed downward offset always goes INTO ring interiors for upper-ring atoms; radial offset pushes badges outward regardless of atom position in ring

decisions.decision: White stroke halo (stroke-width=3, paint-order=stroke fill) on badge text
decisions.rationale: Ensures readability even if badge still overlaps a bond line edge due to tight ring geometry

next_action: Browser verify badge placement on ring molecules (esp. benzene), commit src/hooks/useKetcherHighlights.ts with fix(08) message, then run /gsd-complete-milestone
